intended_use: FLASH EVD is a stereotactic image guidance system intended for the spatial positioning and orientation of neurosurgical instruments. The device is only indicated for cranial surgery where reference to
intended_use_full: FLASH EVD is a stereotactic image guidance system intended for the spatial positioning and orientation of neurosurgical instruments. The device is only indicated for cranial surgery where reference to a rigid anatomical structure can be identified, does not require rigid fixation of the patient, and does not require fixation of a navigated instrument guide to the patient.
target_condition: Elevated intracranial pressure with disruption of cerebrospinal fluid flow requiring external ventricular drainage
ground_truth: ASTM F2554-10 standard and physically measured ground truth positions on phantom models
other_metrics: Linear Placement Error: <2.0 mm to 99% Confidence Interval; Angular Placement Error: <2° to 99% Confidence Interval; Target Registration Error (TRE) and Trajectory Angular Error (TAE) evaluated on phantom models
